## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / module
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps
- [ ] Breaking change

## Module(s) Affected
<!-- e.g. HRMS, CRM, Accounts, Platform Core, Website -->

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`mvn test` / `pnpm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`pnpm type-check`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested with real tenant data (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Demo
<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots or a short screen recording -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows existing code patterns and conventions
- [ ] No hardcoded tenant IDs, credentials, or URLs
- [ ] Migrations are backward-compatible
- [ ] New environment variables documented in `.env.example`
- [ ] Breaking changes noted in CHANGELOG or description
